score_rationale: Toy rubric supports limited formative scoring; strongest weaknesses are method clarity, numerical results, and claim calibration.

must_fix.issue: Causal proof claim from unreplicated qualitative observation.
No quantitative or raw data support the Results criterion.

claim_calibration.claim: This proves that light makes yeast grow faster.
claim_calibration.recommended_calibration: The light condition appeared more cloudy in this unreplicated qualitative observation.

data_method_traceability.needed_detail: raw observations or quantitative growth readings

policy_guideline_boundaries.note: Do not generalize toy scoring criteria to real dissertation review.

draft_stage_caveats: Early-draft status means raw-data and source-pack gaps are revision priorities, not final-submission judgments.
next_actions: Add domain sources before factual biology adjudication.
